titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale College Records Concerning the Floating Counselor Program
Yale College Records Concerning the Floating Counselor Program
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:25

did.unittitle: Yale College records concerning the floating counselor program
did.abstract: The records consist of budget materials, applications, assignments and schedules, and statements documenting the Yale College floating counselor program.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 9-E (YRG 9-E), Records of Yale College offices, programs, and projects.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright for materials authored or otherwise produced as official business of Yale University is retained by Yale University. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale College Records Concerning the Floating Counselor Program (RU 576). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of budget materials, applications, assignments and schedules, and statements documenting the Yale College floating counselor program.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by subject.

did.unittitle: Records concerning the floating counselor program
Miscellaneous Department Accounts Special Use Accounts
